replacements.List pending and paired devices: 列出待处理和已配对设备
replacements.Clear paired devices from the gateway ta: 从网关表中清空已配对设备
replacements.Also reject all pending pairing requests: 同时拒绝所有待处理的配对请求
replacements.Approve a pending device pairing request: 批准待处理的设备配对请求
replacements.Approve the most recent pending request: 批准最新的待处理请求
replacements.Reject a pending device pairing request: 拒绝待处理的设备配对请求
